coordinates: origin top-left, x right, y down
word_equation: carbon dioxide + calcium hydroxide → calcium carbonate + water
results_view: bird's-eye limewater visibility and turbidity observation

carbon_dioxide_test.apparatus: two conical flasks sealed with one-hole bungs and joined by a gas delivery tube
carbon_dioxide_test.bung_holes: one central tube hole in each bung
carbon_dioxide_test.inlet_outlet_position: below the limewater surface near the base of the receiver flask
carbon_dioxide_test.bubble_motion: rising plume through the limewater to the surface
